name: Rage of One Thousand Grieving Widows

system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Command against TN 6
Type: Normal
Qi: 6

You throw your hands down and raise your head to release a powerful scream, causing your whole body to emanate a blast of energy that flushes over the land and kills weaker foes. Make a Command Skill roll against TN 6. On a Success you create a 300-foot radius blast per Rank of Neigong that knocks all affected targets on the ground and stuns them for one round. On a Total Success they are stunned for three rounds. This ability only affects targets with no Ranks in Qi. Cathartic: All affected targets in the area are killed. This only affects targets with no Ranks in Qi.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetEffects: Resolve weaker-foe death threshold and area effects from the entry
system.catharticEffect: All affected targets in the area are killed. This only affects targets with no Ranks in Qi.
